'''Shankti Drive Works''' was a technological company that was headquartered in the city of [[D'larah]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Demophon]]. They specialized in the manufacture and production of [[Hyperdrive motivator/Legends|hyperdrive motivators]] and were at the forefront of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] technology. Their hyperdrive motivators were used extensively on [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]. Their sister corporation, [[Tumleh Navigation]], specialized in the production of navigation systems for hyperspace engines as well as research into hyperspatial programming and navigation.

==Behind the scenes==
The Far Orbit Project misspells ''Shankti Drive Works'' as ''Shanki Drive Works''.
